Now, Ipemfote, in excrcise of the powers conferred by sub-sectiohs (1) and (3) of Section 3-of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government - hereby makes the following further amendment in the Order of the Govm!mml of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, pumber 8.0. 93(E), dated the 29th January, 1998, namely :— Inthe said Order, in paragraph 1, for the words “for a N period of nine years”, the words “for a period of nine year and six months or till alternative arrangements are mad¢ under Section 3(3) of Environment (Protection) Act, 1986, whichever is earlier” shall be - substituted. .
